title: Payroll and Timekeeping Clerks
description: Compile and record employee time and payroll data. May compute employees' time worked, production, and commission. May compute and post wages and deductions, or prepare paychecks.

tasks.text: Verify attendance, hours worked, and pay adjustments, and post information onto designated records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process and issue employee paychecks and statements of earnings and deductions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute wages and deductions, and enter data into computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Process paperwork for new employees and enter employee information into the payroll system.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and balance period-end reports, and reconcile issued payrolls to bank statements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review time sheets, work charts, wage computation, and other information to detect and reconcile payroll discrepancies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Distribute and collect timecards each pay period.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record employee information, such as exemptions, transfers, and resignations, to maintain and update payroll records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Issue and record adjustments to pay related to previous errors or retroactive increases.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Keep track of leave time, such as vacation, personal, and sick leave, for employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile employee time, production, and payroll data from time sheets and other records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Keep informed about changes in tax and deduction laws that apply to the payroll process.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete time sheets showing employees' arrival and departure times.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide information to employees and managers on payroll matters, tax issues, benefit plans, and collective agreement provisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct verifications of employment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and file payroll tax returns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile statistical reports, statements, and summaries related to pay and benefits accounts, and submit them to appropriate departments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Balance cash and payroll accounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete, verify, and process forms and documentation for administration of benefits, such as pension plans, and unemployment and medical insurance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train employees on organizations' timekeeping systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate special programs, such as United Way campaigns, that involve payroll deductions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
